title: Develop feeding plans for an intensive livestock production system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop feeding plans for an intensive livestock production system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select ingredients for feed

pcs.text: Identify nutritional needs for class of livestock from available information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify nutritional needs for class of livestock from available information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify nutritional needs for class of livestock from available information.

pcs.text: Source nutritional advice from industry or workplace sources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source nutritional advice from industry or workplace sources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source nutritional advice from industry or workplace sources.

pcs.text: Select ingredients that provide for the identified nutritional need of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select ingredients that provide for the identified nutritional need of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select ingredients that provide for the identified nutritional need of livestock.

pcs.text: Select suppliers on the basis of quality and cost of feed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suppliers on the basis of quality and cost of feed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suppliers on the basis of quality and cost of feed.

pcs.text: Determine quantities of individual ingredients required based on available information and expert or supplier advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine quantities of individual ingredients required based on available information and expert or supplier advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine quantities of individual ingredients required based on available information and expert or supplier advice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Select ingredients for feed

elements.title: Determine feed rations and schedules

pcs.text: Determine total feed quantities required for livestock from the production program, based on available information and expert advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine total feed quantities required for livestock from the production program, based on available information and expert advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine total feed quantities required for livestock from the production program, based on available information and expert advice.

pcs.text: Consider available laboratory testing results when determining the quantities of each ingredient used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider available laboratory testing results when determining the quantities of each ingredient used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider available laboratory testing results when determining the quantities of each ingredient used.

pcs.text: Schedule feeding and allocate responsibility for feeding according to the production program and other operations occurring within the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule feeding and allocate responsibility for feeding according to the production program and other operations occurring within the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule feeding and allocate responsibility for feeding according to the production program and other operations occurring within the site.

pcs.text: Identify the methods of providing feed to livestock based on the production plan and advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the methods of providing feed to livestock based on the production plan and advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the methods of providing feed to livestock based on the production plan and advice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine feed rations and schedules

elements.title: Supervise mixing and storage of feed

pcs.text: Organise secure and hygienic storage of feed and ingredients to eliminate contamination and infestation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise secure and hygienic storage of feed and ingredients to eliminate contamination and infestation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise secure and hygienic storage of feed and ingredients to eliminate contamination and infestation.

pcs.text: Select storage location to ensure safe access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select storage location to ensure safe access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select storage location to ensure safe access.

pcs.text: Organise rotation of feedstocks and replacements to arrive at the appropriate time to ensure optimum freshness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise rotation of feedstocks and replacements to arrive at the appropriate time to ensure optimum freshness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise rotation of feedstocks and replacements to arrive at the appropriate time to ensure optimum freshness.

pcs.text: Organise mixing of feed to suit the needs of the livestock, identified nutritional requirements and workplace equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise mixing of feed to suit the needs of the livestock, identified nutritional requirements and workplace equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise mixing of feed to suit the needs of the livestock, identified nutritional requirements and workplace equipment.

pcs.text: Add medications to feeds according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Add medications to feeds according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Add medications to feeds according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Take, package and label samples of feed and forward them to the laboratory for testing according to production program schedules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take, package and label samples of feed and forward them to the laboratory for testing according to production program schedules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take, package and label samples of feed and forward them to the laboratory for testing according to production program schedules.

pcs.text: Check calibration of measuring equipment and calculation of quantities at regular intervals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check calibration of measuring equipment and calculation of quantities at regular intervals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check calibration of measuring equipment and calculation of quantities at regular intervals.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risk according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risk according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risk according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Comply with workplace biosecurity policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with workplace biosecurity policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with workplace biosecurity policies.

elements.title: Supervise feeding

pcs.text: Supply rations to the livestock according to the production program and schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supply rations to the livestock according to the production program and schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supply rations to the livestock according to the production program and schedule.

pcs.text: Make potable water available continuously to the livestock

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make potable water available continuously to the livestock.

pcs.text: Monitor the health and wellbeing of the livestock according to workplace requirements and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the health and wellbeing of the livestock according to workplace requirements and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the health and wellbeing of the livestock according to workplace requirements and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Monitor and report any change in production levels as a direct result of changes to feed types, ingredients or schedules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and report any change in production levels as a direct result of changes to feed types, ingredients or schedules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and report any change in production levels as a direct result of changes to feed types, ingredients or schedules.

pcs.text: Provide advice to staff during the feeding operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide advice to staff during the feeding operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide advice to staff during the feeding operation.

pcs.text: Store, remove or dispose of waste materials and substances according to legislation, environment policies and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store, remove or dispose of waste materials and substances according to legislation, environment policies and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store, remove or dispose of waste materials and substances according to legislation, environment policies and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain and store documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain and store documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain and store documentation according to workplace procedures.
